response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile aimed at first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, could be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. Our team offers comprehensive support for both buyers and sellers, covering all aspects of real estate transactions and financing. We are committed to building long-term relationships with our clients and ensuring a seamless and trustworthy real estate experience. Services are available in key locations including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, and Lancaster Park. We are operated by a small team of experienced real estate professionals.
